detectors.description:
TokenERC20.transferFrom(address,address,uint256).to (PitbullToken.sol#237) lacks a zero-check on :
		- newun = to (PitbullToken.sol#239)

TokenERC20.transfernewun(address)._newun (PitbullToken.sol#193) lacks a zero-check on :
		- newun = _newun (PitbullToken.sol#195)

Version constraint >=0.5.17 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- MissingEscapingInFormatting
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow.
It is used by:
	- >=0.5.17 (PitbullToken.sol#25)

detectors.description: Parameter TokenERC20.transfernewun(address)._newun (PitbullToken.sol#193) is not in mixedCase

	- _totalSupply = 1000000000000000000000000000000 (PitbullToken.sol#185)

detectors.description:
receiveApproval(address,uint256,address,bytes) should be declared external:
	- ApproveAndCallFallBack.receiveApproval(address,uint256,address,bytes) (PitbullToken.sol#95)
Moreover, the following function parameters should change its data location:
data location should be calldata
